name: Miniprep Buffer P1 (Resuspension)
nameCn: 质粒提取缓冲液 P1 (重悬液)

notes.en: Prepare Tris-EDTA, autoclave, cool to RT, then add RNase A. RNase A is heat-sensitive — do not autoclave. Store at 4°C.
notes.zh: 先配 Tris-EDTA，高压灭菌后冷却，再加 RNase A。RNase A 热敏，不可高压灭菌。4°C 保存。

ref: Birnboim & Doly (1979) Nucleic Acids Res 7:1513; Sambrook & Russell (2001)

storage.notes: Add RNase A fresh or store P1+RNase at 4°C

usage.en: Resuspension buffer for alkaline lysis miniprep plasmid extraction (contains RNase A).
usage.zh: 碱裂解 miniprep 质粒提取的重悬缓冲液（含 RNase A）。

prepSteps.step: Dissolve Tris-HCl and EDTA in ~400 mL ddH₂O.
Add RNase A to 100 µg/mL (add after autoclaving and cooling).
Autoclave base buffer, then add RNase A.
Store at 4°C (RNase A is stable at 4°C for months).
